name: Scrim Calendar
description: A team scrimmage scheduling calendar showing opponent matchups, map plans, time slots, player availability, and confirmation status across weeks or months.

week.description: Seven-column weekly grid with hourly time rows and scrim blocks spanning their duration for tactical weekly planning workflows

month.description: Standard monthly calendar grid with condensed scrim pills inside each day cell for long-horizon season schedule planning overviews

list.description: Agenda list view grouped by date with detailed scrim entries showing opponent, map pool, roster, and confirmation status per entry

visual_brief: A week grid with days as columns and hourly time slots as rows. Each scrim appears as a colored block spanning its duration (e.g. 7pm-9pm slot). Block contains: opponent team logo in top-left, opponent name in bold, map chips row (e.g. 'Haven' 'Ascent' 'Pearl') with small map thumbnails, and an availability status indicator (Confirmed: green filled, Pending: amber striped, Cancelled: gray strikethrough). Time-slot backgrounds faintly shaded to show standard practice hours. Block color encodes importance: Official match red, Tournament orange, Practice scrim teal, Coaching session purple. Player availability dots appear along the left edge of each block showing which 5 players are confirmed (green), tentative (amber), or unavailable (red). 'Now' horizontal line overlays the current time. Month preset shows condensed event pills inside day cells.

layout_hints.note: Calendar must support drag-to-reschedule. Scrim blocks clickable (d-interactive) for edit modal.
layout_hints.status_labels: Availability status uses text labels not color-only (Confirmed/Pending/Cancelled).

slots.calendar-grid: Main grid container with time-axis column on left and day columns across. Hosts scrim blocks absolutely positioned.
slots.scrim-block: Repeating colored block positioned by start/end time and day. Contains opponent, maps, status, and availability dots.
slots.team-logo: Opponent team emblem image shown in top-left of each scrim block.
slots.map-chip: Small labeled pill with map name and thumbnail, grouped in a row inside each block.
slots.time-slot: Repeating hour row in the time-axis column with HH:MM label.

keyboard: N: create new scrim on focused cell

responsive.mobile: Week view shrinks to single-day scrollable column. Month view becomes list preset automatically.
responsive.tablet: Week view retained with narrower day columns. Map chips collapse to count badge.

micro.drag-handle: cursor grab + block scale(1.02) on drag 120ms

ambient.now-line: current time horizontal line subtle pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite

composition.ScrimCalendar: Section(d-section) > [Toolbar(week-nav + view-switcher) + CalendarGrid > [TimeAxis > TimeSlot[] + DayColumns > ScrimBlock[](d-interactive) > [TeamLogo + OpponentName + MapChip[] + AvailabilityStatus + PlayerAvailabilityDots]] + NowLine]
